_comment: 10 curated open Delphi mainnet markets for run-duel and the web UI. Captured 2026-04-29. Mix of binary and multi-outcome, resolution dates spread May–Dec 2026.

markets.question: Will there be another $10+ million exploit in Crypto before end of May?
markets.demo_pitch: Binary, near-term, fact-driven. Bull cites recent exploit cadence, bear cites improving audit/insurance practices. Battle-tested debate dynamics.

markets.question: Will daily x402 volume hit $3M in 2026?
markets.demo_pitch: Closest thing to AI/tech in Delphi's catalog. x402 is the agentic-payment protocol; debate is about adoption curves and developer momentum.

markets.question: Total Crypto Market Cap By The End of 2026
markets.demo_pitch: Multi-outcome (8 buckets) macro debate. Stress-tests our champion-outcome logic; the orchestrator picks one bucket as YES and the rest as NO.

markets.question: 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner
markets.demo_pitch: Universally recognizable. The biggest sports market for this period — every pitch audience has an opinion.

markets.question: 2026 NBA Champion
markets.demo_pitch: Near-term US team-sport multi-outcome. Resolves June so there's still real uncertainty.

markets.question: 2026 F1 Drivers' Champion
markets.demo_pitch: Long-horizon individual sport with 20 candidates. Useful contrast to team sports — agents have to reason about season-long form, team performance, reliability.

markets.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026
markets.demo_pitch: High-stakes geopolitics, near-term resolution. Prior demo run had bull open below market at 0.15 and agents converged on NO — showcases honest-analyst behavior.

markets.question: Will aliens formally introduce themselves in 2026?
markets.demo_pitch: Whimsical closer. Low-stakes, lets agents flex without anyone getting hurt by a wrong answer.

markets.question: Will the PS6 get announced in 2026?
markets.demo_pitch: Hardware-cycle / Sony-signaling reasoning. Tech-adjacent debate that resonates with Web3 / agentic-product audiences.

markets.question: Will Grand Theft Auto 6 get delayed until 2027?
markets.demo_pitch: Notoriously contentious gaming-industry topic. Lots of surface area for both sides — Rockstar's history of delays vs current marketing/build signals.
